_INSTRUCTIONS_FOR_PLAYER: Use this to create or rebuild ONE character.
1. Open Gemini (gemini.google.com) or any AI chat
3. Tell the AI what you want:
'Create a level 3 Tiefling Warlock with the Fiend patron, charlatan background.
She's a fast-talking con artist who made a desperate pact to save her sister.'
4. Copy the JSON the AI gives you
5. In the app: open your character sheet > tap Edit > tap '📋 Update from JSON'
6. Paste the JSON, make sure 'Preserve HP, XP, conditions & inventory' is UNCHECKED
(since this is a brand new character)
- Give the AI a personality hook or backstory seed — it'll fill in the RP fields
- Ask for a specific stat method: 'use standard array', 'roll 4d6 drop lowest', 'point buy 27'
- For multiclass: 'Level 5 Fighter 3 / Rogue 2' — the AI should calculate everything
- You can paste the output of this into the full party template's pcs array too
_INSTRUCTIONS_FOR_AI: INSTRUCTIONS FOR THE AI:
Create a single D&D 5e character using the format below.
Replace all placeholder values with real D&D 5e data for the requested character.
RULES:
- Stats format: '16 (+3)' — always include the modifier in parens
- HP = hit die max + CON modifier at level 1, plus average per level after (Fighter: 10+6/lvl, Wizard: 6+4/lvl, etc.)
- AC must reflect actual armor worn
- initiative = DEX modifier
- passive_perception = 10 + WIS mod + proficiency bonus (if proficient in Perception)
- passive_insight = 10 + WIS mod + proficiency bonus (if proficient in Insight)
- skills: comma-separated list of ALL proficient skills with computed modifiers
- skillProfs: array with saving throw proficiencies AND skill names, e.g. ['DEX Save', 'CHA Save', 'Deception', 'Stealth']
- features: ALL class, subclass, racial, and feat features with full descriptions. String format with \n separators, or array of {name, description} objects (app auto-converts)
- magic: empty string for non-casters. For casters: 'Spellcasting: [Ability] | Save DC: [N] | Attack Bonus: +[N]\nCantrips: ...\nLevel 1 Spells: ...'
- spellbook: array of spell objects with full descriptions for ALL known/prepared spells (see format below)
- slots: [] for non-casters. For casters: [{max: N, used: 0}] per spell level
- attacks: at least one entry per equipped weapon and offensive cantrip
- resources: all trackable abilities (Second Wind, Bardic Inspiration, Lay on Hands, Channel Divinity, etc.)
- inventory: full starting equipment with weights, types, and notes
- backstory: fill in all RP fields based on the character concept the player described
OUTPUT: Return ONLY the character JSON object (no wrapper, no pcs array, no code fences, no commentary).
The player will paste it directly into a single-character import dialog.
name: CHARACTER NAME

_familiar_format_reference._comment: If the character has a familiar, replace familiar: null with this structure
_familiar_format_reference.name: Familiar Name
_familiar_format_reference.notes: Flyby, Keen Hearing & Sight, darkvision 120 ft.

bonds: Who or what you care about
